expectations.text: Form class extends ConfirmFormBase (NOT FormBase or ConfigFormBase) -- ConfirmFormBase provides the confirmation UI automatically with question text, description, confirm button, and cancel link
expectations.evidence: /tmp/d10-forms-api-without/web/modules/custom/content_cleanup/src/Form/ContentCleanupForm.php line 7: 'use Drupal\Core\Form\ConfirmFormBase;' and line 16: 'class ContentCleanupForm extends ConfirmFormBase'

expectations.text: getQuestion() method exists and returns a translatable string via $this->t() or new TranslatableMarkup() describing the action -- this method is required by ConfirmFormBase and without it the confirmation page renders with no question text
expectations.evidence: /tmp/d10-forms-api-without/web/modules/custom/content_cleanup/src/Form/ContentCleanupForm.php lines 65-67: 'public function getQuestion() { return $this->t("Are you sure you want to delete unpublished items older than 30 days?"); }'

expectations.text: getCancelUrl() method returns a Url object via new Url() or Url::fromRoute() (NOT a plain string path like '/admin/content' -- ConfirmFormBase requires a Url object and passing a string causes a fatal TypeError)
expectations.evidence: /tmp/d10-forms-api-without/web/modules/custom/content_cleanup/src/Form/ContentCleanupForm.php lines 79-81: 'public function getCancelUrl() { return Url::fromRoute("system.admin_content"); }'. Drush verification confirmed getCancelUrl() returns a Drupal\Core\Url object.

expectations.text: submitForm() redirects after completion using $form_state->setRedirectUrl() or $form_state->setRedirect() (NOT drupal_goto() which was removed in D8, NOT omitting redirect which leaves the user stuck on the confirmation page after submit)
Route definition uses _form key pointing to the form class (NOT _controller -- using _controller for a form bypasses CSRF protection, form token validation, and the full Form API lifecycle)
Route uses _permission for access control (e.g., 'administer nodes' or similar admin permission)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_cleanup returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command 'cd /tmp/d10-forms-api-without && ddev drush en content_cleanup -y' returned: '[notice] Already installed: content_cleanup', exit code 0

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/content/cleanup -- verify the confirmation page renders with question text and both confirm and cancel buttons visible (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: No eval-browser report available. Verified via drush script: form renders with #title set to TranslatableMarkup 'Are you sure you want to delete unpublished items older than 30 days?', submit button (value='Delete') present in rendered output, and Cancel link pointing to /admin/content present. Route resolves to /admin/content/cleanup with _permission: 'administer nodes' access control.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs reported 1 error in ContentCleanupForm.php: 'Line 10 | ERROR | There must be one blank line after the last USE statement; 2 found'. Two blank lines exist after the last use statement (lines 10-11). Exit code: 2.
